summary: Iteration 81: Complete testing of Sentinel Lock page NEW features - custom product images and interactive video demo. ALL TESTS PASSED. All 4 product images (hero, exploded, installed, closeup) load correctly from static.prod-images.emergentagent.com. Interactive demo with 6-step simulation animation works perfectly including state transitions (STANDBY→ARMADA→ANALIZANDO→ALERTA→TRANSMITIENDO→DESPACHO→SEGURO), LED color changes, and play/stop button functionality. All CTA buttons are clickable and navigate correctly.

issues: Minor React warning: Invalid DOM property 'fetchpriority'. Should be 'fetchPriority' (camelCase) - cosmetic issue only

critical_code_review_comments: Consider fixing React warning by changing fetchpriority to fetchPriority in img tag (line 209)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 81 verified all NEW features on Sentinel Lock page (/sentinel-lock). Product images: hero (6df0bd56a2), exploded (96eb06330e), installed (7cee4f876a), closeup (8c3ae3c8) all loading from static.prod-images.emergentagent.com. Interactive demo: play button (demo-play-btn) starts/stops 6-step simulation with 2800ms per step. States: Normal/ARMADA(green), Vibracion/ANALIZANDO(amber), Intrusion/ALERTA(red), Transmitiendo/TRANSMITIENDO(blue), Policia/DESPACHO(indigo), Resuelto/SEGURO(green). All CTAs (lock-cta-contact, lock-cta-buy, lock-final-cta) navigate to /contacto. Ecosystem cross-links to /plataforma-cra and /manoprotect-connect work.
